synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0975 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 glib2 security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0975

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0975.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
glib2-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.x86_64.rpm
glib2-devel-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.x86_64.rpm
glib2-doc-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.x86_64.rpm
glib2-static-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.x86_64.rpm
glib2-tests-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
glib2-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.aarch64.rpm
glib2-devel-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.aarch64.rpm
glib2-doc-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.aarch64.rpm
glib2-static-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.aarch64.rpm
glib2-tests-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/glib2-2.80.4-10.el10_1.12.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-13601




Description of changes:

[2.80.4-12]
- Fix NVR

[2.80.4-11]
- Add patch for CVE-2025-13601
